title: Citrusy Russian Skillet Cake
description: A moist and flavorful skillet cake infused with the brightness of citrus and the richness of Russian spices.
instructions: Grease a 9-inch (23cm) oven-safe skillet with butter.
In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and zest.
In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, eggs, and honey.
Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and stir until combined.
Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Pour melted butter into the skillet with the cake batter.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean.
Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
